name: Hotter Than Heck Horseradish Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the horseradish and garlic powder until well combined.
2. Add the sour cream and white pepper, stirring to ensure everything is evenly blended.
3. Cover the mixture and chill in the refrigerator.
4. This recipe yields approximately 2 1/4 cups of dip.
5. Suggested dippers: Rolls of sliced roast beef, steamed cauliflower, bell peppers, potato chips, snow peas.
